text: You venture into the city and notice a flash out of the corner of your eye, a dark flash. You glance again only to see nothing but an open manhole cover and a hole that seemingly leads to the city’s sewers, you also notice a shiny plank from further down the street that Reads “New London’s Extraordinarily Valuable Museum and Soup.” There is a choice before you. To descend into the stinky depths or to follow the light into the the wondrous museum
